title: selinum stelliphorum
intro: Selinum stelliphorum, also known as Starry Carrot or Carrot Thistle, is a perennial plant in the Apiaceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selinum stelliphorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
